verses.text: Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Siampite aw, note-a' dingin hih lai-ah thupiakna khat om hi

Na gamtatna uh tawh kei nong zahtak ding uh hi. Ka thugente ngailoin, thupi takin na lak kei uh leh note tungah samsiatna ka hong tungsak ding a, siampi hihna tawh na ngah uh thuphate tungah samsiatna ka tungsak ding hi. A taktakin ci lehang, note in ka thupiaknate thupi laklo na hih manun na thupha ngahte uh tungah samsiatna ka tungsakzo hi
Na suanlekhakte uh nakpi takin ka thuhilh ding a, note ahih leh, na biakpiakna ganhing uh a ekte tawh na maitang uh hong zut gawpin tuate tawh kong lawnkhia khawm ding hi
Tua ciangin Levi' suanlekhakte ahi siampite tawh ka thuciamna a kip nawnlo ahihna thu, hih thu kong genna-ah na thei ding uh hi
“Amaute a nuntakna ding leh a nopsakna ding thu ka ciam a, amaute in kei hong zahtak theihna dingun hih ka thuciamte khempeuh ka pia hi. Amaute in kei hong zahtakin hong kihta takpi uh hi
Amaute in thuman taktakte mah hilhin gen uh a, amaute' kam panin zuauthu gingkhialo hi. Ka deihna bangin amaute gamta uh a, a khial ding mi tampite, thuman lamah a paisak uh hi
Siampite' nasep pen Pasian a manin theihna ding a hilh ding uh ahi hi. Amaute pen, Vanglian Topa' kamtaite ahih manun, mite in keima deihna a theihna dingun amaute' tungah thu a dot ding uh ahi hi
“Ahi zongin, no siampite na hih uh leh lampi man panin na pial khin uh hi. Na thuhilhnate un mi tampi tak khialsak hi. Note tawh ka bawl thuciamna na palsat khin uh hi

Tua ahih manin, note in ka thuhilhna zuiloin, keima thu na hilh uh ciangin zong a kibangin hilhloin mi na deidan mah uh bangin, kei zong mi khempeuh mai-ah simmawhna leh niamkhiatna kong ngahsak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Eite khempeuh in, eite a hong piangsak Pasian ahi Pa khat bek nei hilo ihi hiam? Tua hinapi-in bang hangin eite khatlekhat tungah citakloin, i pu i pate tawh a bawl, Pasian' thuciamna palsat ihi hiam

Judah mite citakloin, Pasian tungah a thuciamna uh palsat uh a, Israel mite' lak leh Jerusalem khuasungah siatna tampi gamta uh hi. Topa in a it mahmah biakinn ninsak uh hi. Topa a hilo, pasian dang a bia numeite, zi-in la-in a ten'pih uh hi
Hih bangin a gamta mi peuhmah, a kua a kua hita leh, Topa in sugawp hen la, Vanglian Topa tungah biakna a paipih ei minamte tawh hong kigawmsak nawn kei hen
Note' gamtatna adang khat omlai hi. Tua pen, note' paipih biaknate hong sang nawnlo ahih manin Topa' biakna tau, khitui tawh na kawtsak uh a, kapin thumin na om uh hi

Bang hangin hong sanglo hiam, na ci uh hi. Na khangnolai uha na ten'pih na zite uh tungah na cihtaklohna uh amah in hong thei a, na zite uh tungah na cihtak tawntungna ding uh Pasian tungah thu ciamin, na zite uh zong na lawmnu mah uh hinapi-in amaute tawh na thuciamna uh na pelhna hang uh ahi hi

Pasian in na zite uh tawh pumkhat, lungsim khat ahi dingin hong bawl hilo ahi hiam? Hih bangin a hong bawlna pen bang a deihna ahi hiam? Pasian' mi taktak ahi ding tate i neih theihna ding ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na khangno lai-un na ten'pih na zi uh tawh na thuciamna uh na palsatkhak lohna dingun kidawm un

Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Zi makna ka deih kei a, mi khatpeuh in a khangno lai-a a ten'pih a zi tungah tua bang gitlohna a gamtatna ka mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kidawm un la, a citak dingin na zite uh tungah na thuciamna uh palsat kei un,” ci hi, a ci hi.

Thu na gengenna uh tawh Topa na gimsak uh hi. Note in, “Bangci gimsak ka hi uh hiam?” na ci uh hi. “ Topa in a sia-in a gamtate a hoihin ngaihsun a, zong itin amaute tungah lungkim takpi hi,” na cihna khawng uh leh, “Thutang a gen Pasian koi lai-ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in na dotnate uh tawh na gimsak uh hi.
